# LoopStack AI — Extended Profile

> LoopStack is a UK-based AI automation consultant and software agency. We build custom AI workflows, intelligent chatbots, and business automation systems for UK businesses — scoped, built, and handed over at a fixed price. No hourly billing, no vendor lock-in. Founded 2025, registered in England and Wales as LoopStack AI Ltd.

For the concise version see https://loopstack.uk/llms.txt

---

## Full Service Descriptions

### AI Automation Consulting
End-to-end AI automation consulting for UK businesses. We map your current processes, identify the highest-impact automation opportunities, select the right tools for your stack, build the solution, test it against your real data, and hand it over fully documented. Every project includes a video walkthrough and training session so your team can run it independently. Projects start from £997 fixed price. Typical ROI within 6 weeks.

### ChatGPT & LLM Consulting
Practical GPT-4 and Claude implementations for real business workflows. We build customer support bots trained on your knowledge base, document extraction pipelines that read invoices and contracts, internal knowledge bases that answer staff questions instantly, and lead qualification chatbots that book meetings automatically. Every AI output is grounded in your data. Deployed within 2 weeks for most projects.

### AI Chatbot Development
Custom AI chatbots built on GPT-4 or Claude. Handles tier-1 support, qualifies inbound leads, books appointments, answers FAQ, and routes complex queries to human staff. Trained on your documentation, knowledge base, and FAQs. Available 24/7. Deployed within 2 weeks. Typical cost from £997.

### Business Process Automation
Automating document processing, lead management, employee onboarding, financial operations, reporting, HR administration, and more using Make (formerly Integromat), Zapier, or n8n. We connect your existing tools — HubSpot, Salesforce, Xero, QuickBooks, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Slack, and hundreds more via API. One-off workflows from £997. Multi-step suites from £2,497.

### Custom Software Development
Internal dashboards, client portals, API integrations, AI-powered applications, data pipelines, and MVPs. We build bespoke software when off-the-shelf tools will not cut it. Fixed-price quotes, full IP transfer, no ongoing license fees. Built with modern stacks (Python, JavaScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL).

### Web App Development
Custom web applications for UK businesses: booking systems, operational dashboards, client portals, AI-enhanced tools, and SaaS platforms. Examples include TenurAI (AI compliance co-pilot for lettings) and LoopStack Recruit (AI recruitment toolkit). From concept to deployed product, fixed-price, fully documented.

### AI for Small Business
Affordable AI automation for UK SMEs from £997. Target automations: invoice data extraction and entry, automated lead follow-up sequences, AI chatbots that handle tier-1 customer support, email triage and routing, automatic report generation, calendar management, CRM data enrichment. Most clients recover the cost within 6 weeks through time saved.

### Hire an AI Consultant
Hire a dedicated UK AI consultant for project-based or retained work. Fixed-price, full IP transfer, same timezone, no offshore handoffs. Project retainers from £799/month. Free 30-minute discovery call to scope your project and confirm the price.

---

## About LoopStack

### The Founder

Andy Hatcher, Founder and AI Automation Consultant at LoopStack AI Ltd.

Andy has over 35 years of experience in IT spanning audio visual engineering, infrastructure and networking, software development, SEO and digital marketing, IT management, digital transformation, recording studio design and build, and now AI automation consulting. He founded LoopStack in 2025 to bring practical, fixed-price AI automation to UK businesses.

### The Company

LoopStack AI Ltd is registered in England and Wales. We operate as a UK-based consultancy with no offshore handoffs, no third-party intermediaries, and no communication delays from timezone differences. All project management, development, and support is handled directly by our UK team.

---

## Case Study: Logistics Invoice Automation

**Client:** UK logistics firm processing high volumes of supplier invoices
**Challenge:** Manual data entry from invoices into their accounting system was taking two members of staff several hours per day.
**Solution:** LoopStack built a document intelligence pipeline that automatically reads incoming invoices (PDF and scanned), extracts key fields, validates against purchase order data, and posts directly to Xero.
**Results:**
- 95% reduction in manual data entry time
- 98% error rate reduction
- 40+ hours saved per month
- ROI achieved within 6 weeks

---

## Project: TenurAI — AI Compliance Co-Pilot

Full-stack SaaS platform for the UK lettings industry. AI-powered legislative monitoring, automated document generation, compliance dashboard, and built-in CRM. Built from scratch by LoopStack. Pricing: from £59/month.

## Project: LoopStack Recruit — AI Recruitment Toolkit

Six AI-powered tools for recruiters: JD writer, candidate outreach, CV screener, interview questions, client pitch generator, and psychometric tests. Free tier available. Pro tier from £19.95/month.

---

## Pricing Details

All projects are fixed-price. Clients own everything built.

| Package | Price | Details |
|---------|-------|---------|
| Starter | £997 one-time | Single workflow, up to 3 integrations, 2 weeks support |
| Growth | £2,497 one-time | Multi-step suite, unlimited integrations, AI component, 4 weeks support |
| Retainer | £799/month | Ongoing management, monthly new build, monitoring, quarterly review |

Most UK consultancies charge £5,000-£25,000 per project. LoopStack charges fixed prices from £997.

---

## Key Facts

- First automation deployed within 48 hours of scoping
- 95% average task time reduction
- 40+ automations delivered
- No vendor lock-in — you own everything
- UK-based, same timezone, no offshore handoffs
- Fixed-price only — no hourly billing
- Registered in England and Wales

## Technologies

Make (Integromat), Zapier, n8n, OpenAI GPT-4/4o, Anthropic Claude, HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Airtable, Notion, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Slack, Python, JavaScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL.

## AI Crawler Permissions

LoopStack welcomes all AI crawlers. Robots.txt allows: GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended, anthropic-ai, ClaudeBot, CCBot, PerplexityBot, Bytespider, cohere-ai, Meta-ExternalAgent, Applebot-Extended, Amazonbot, YouBot.
